title: Tender Ukrainian Pillowy Bake
description: A savory, whole30-friendly Ukrainian dish with a pillowy texture, perfect for meal prep. This recipe features a delicious combination of yeast, herbs, and spices.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
Add the bacon fat, onions, garlic, parsley, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add the eggs and Greek yogurt to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the yakimono-grill to medium-high heat.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 6 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place the disks on the yakimono-grill and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the bake to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
